reason: L63 links the merged-away lowercase docs/capabilities.md; the fix is a one-line pointer edit in PLATFORM-LIMITS.md, which this case-collision PR is contractually barred from touching (a pending append owns that file). Deferred to that file's owner.

born-red HOLD: this PR ADDS a session card that declares an in-progress/drafted Status — the gate holds the merge red until the card flips complete (designed hold, not a defect). Without this hold a card-only born-red PR with auto-merge pre-armed merges the instant CI reports (superbot-games #40 merged in 24 s on exactly this).

⚑ needs-owner carries asks without the OWNER-ACTION fields (missing: WHERE, HOW, UNBLOCKS) — the owner is the scarcest resource: structure each ask per control/README.md § OWNER-ACTION format (attempt it yourself or cite the exact wall — VERIFIED-NEEDED; assumption-based asks are banned), and withdraw stale asks.

still under the adopt-time UNRENDERED banner (unfilled: fleet_dark_repos, fleet_siblings, fleet_status_command) — answer the slots (`bootstrap.py answer <slot> <value>`), then `bootstrap.py render --live`.

committed digest differs from a fresh render of its sources (skill index + capability ledger) — downstream seat prompts extract these bytes, so drift here ships stale walls/skills fleet-wide; regenerate with `python3 bootstrap.py seat-digest` (never hand-edit — it is a derived render).

the `📊 Model:` line '- **📊 Model:** Claude Fable 5 (family-level)' has no valid three-field payload (needs two `·` separators: model · effort · task-class) — the telemetry harvest records NOTHING from this card; fix the card's line to the taught form `- **📊 Model:** <model> · <effort> · <task-class>` (family-level model · effort · PL-004 task class; see .sessions/README.md)

effort segment 'BOOKS-lane night session' is not one of the taxonomy values (low | medium | high) — the PL-004 dataset records it verbatim; fix the card's line to the taught form `- **📊 Model:** <model> · <effort> · <task-class>` (family-level model · effort · PL-004 task class; see .sessions/README.md)
